summary: Iteration 10 frontend testing at 1440x900. Validated all 4 top-bar controls (Search palette with ⌘K + Esc, Help drawer, Notifications dropdown + mark-all + dismiss, +New menu with 7 items) and the new Check-out flow (bill clearance gating, extras removal, add-payment partial, settle-balance auto-charge, complete-checkout state transition). Regression on public site (/, /rooms, /booking, /dashboard) and Staff & Roles admin page — all load cleanly.

issues: Badge count (3) does not persist as 0 across route navigations after clicking topbar-mark-all — appears to be per-page render. Functional on same page but resets on navigation. Minor.

critical_code_review_comments: Notif mark-all state is component-local; consider hoisting to context/store so badge stays 0 across route changes.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration-10 features verified: Search palette results for 'maharajah' and 'AH-0193A2' work, Ctrl+K opens, Esc closes. Help drawer has 'Keyboard shortcuts' + 'Guides'. Notif dropdown has mark-all + per-item dismiss (topbar-dismiss-N-1). +New menu has all 7 items and new-calendar-plus routes to /admin/reservations with toast. Checkout flow: initial balance ₹172,175 (AH-0193A2), complete-btn disabled with text 'Balance ₹172,175 due', settle-balance-btn zeros balance and enables complete-checkout, row status pill flips to 'Checked out'. Remove extra e2 correctly decreases balance by ₹38,000. Add-payment ₹10,000 decreases by ₹10,000 and keeps complete-btn disabled while balance > 0. Balance uses text-emerald-600 when 0. Everything works.
